invite.title: Invite only
invite.subtitle: This is a private matchmaking experience. Enter your invite key to continue.
invite.error: Invalid key. Check your invite and try again.
invite.noInviteLink: Ask a friend who's already in.

home.headline:
Find your
person.
home.subline: A curated matchmaking experience where your identity stays private until we make the connection.

cards.title: Fill the form
cards.desc: Answer a short questionnaire about you and what you're looking for.

cards.title: We protect your identity
cards.desc: Your Instagram handle is encrypted. You get a codename. Only admins know the link.

cards.title: We make the match
cards.desc: If we see a connection, we reach out directly. No algorithm swiping.

apply.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

s1.title: Who are you?
s1.subtitle: Just the basics — we'll get to know you better in the next steps.
s1.privacy: Your Instagram handle is encrypted end-to-end. Nobody can see it except verified admins. You'll be assigned a codename.

s2.title: About you
s2.subtitle: Help us understand who you are.

s3.title: Your vibe
s3.subtitle: This is where we get to know the real you. Be honest — it's how we find your match.
s3.lifestylePlaceholder: Social drinker? Night owl? Gym rat? Tell us.
s3.tip: Think about how your closest friends would describe you. Authenticity here leads to better matches.

s4.title: What you're looking for
s4.subtitle: Be specific — the more detail you share, the better the match.
s4.longDistanceHint: Would you consider a relationship across cities or countries?
s4.physicalTraitsPlaceholder: Describe what you're attracted to physically...
s4.characterTraitsPlaceholder: What personality traits matter most to you?
s4.dealBreakersPlaceholder: What are absolute no-gos for you?
s4.oppGenderFriends: Okay with partner having many friends of the opposite gender?
s4.religionDealBreaker: Is partner's religion a deal breaker?
s4.religionDealBreakerHint: Would you not date someone of a different faith?

s5.title: Last words
s5.subtitle: Almost done. Just a few more things before we get to work.
s5.affection: How important is physical affection to you?
s5.firstDatePlaceholder: A walk in the park, dinner at a rooftop restaurant, a spontaneous road trip...
s5.disclaimer: I understand that my information is collected only for matchmaking, stored securely, and never sold or shared with third parties.

success.title: You're in.
success.subtitle: Save this link — it's the only way to access your profile.
success.aliasHint: This is your codename. We'll use it when we reach out.
success.warning: This is the only way to access your profile. Once you leave this page, we cannot show it to you again.
success.laterHint: You can also access your profile later at /profile/login with your magic link.

applicants.title: Applicants
applicants.deleteDescription: Deactivates this applicant immediately and schedules permanent deletion in 180 days.

detail.withdrawConfirm: Withdraw this applicant? Their status will be set to inactive.
detail.superAdminRequired: Identity reveal requires super admin access
detail.regenerateMagicLinkConfirm: This invalidates the applicant's current magic link and clears their password — they'll set a new one. Generate a new link to share with them directly?
detail.newMagicLinkHint: New magic link — share it with the applicant directly. It won't be shown again.

matching.title: Matching
matching.subtitle: Run a full pairwise pass over all active applicants
matching.confirmBody: This will create new match proposals.
matching.multilingualWarning: Baseline and cosine algorithms use keyword overlap on free-text fields. They may produce poor results when applicants filled the form in different languages. Use <bold>Embedding</bold> for multilingual accuracy.

matches.title: Matches
matches.subtitle: Couple proposals — track who to contact and how it goes
matches.empty: No matches found. Run the matching algorithm to generate couple proposals.

login.magicLinkHint: Please use your magic link to access your profile. Check the confirmation message you received after submitting your application.
login.firstTimeSetup: You're setting up your profile for the first time.
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.setPasswordFailed: Failed to set password. Please try again.
login.suggestedPasswordHint: Your suggested password — copy it somewhere safe before continuing:
login.enterPasswordHint: Enter your password to access your profile.

dashboard.findingMatches: We're finding your best matches. You'll be notified when they're ready.
dashboard.dormantBody: Thank you for being part of Ons.
dashboard.nextPhaseBody: New matches arrive with the next matching phase — check back tomorrow.
dashboard.noneAtThresholdBody: Lower the slider to see more matches.

deletion.title: Time until deletion
deletion.body: Your account and data will be permanently deleted when this reaches zero.
deletion.cancelConfirm: This cancels the scheduled deletion and restores your account to the matching pool.
deletion.deleteNowConfirm: This immediately and permanently deletes your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

matches.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
matches.confirmContactBody: {{alias}} is @{{handle}} on Instagram. Ready to reach out? If you pass now, this match closes for good and you will wait for the next matching phase for new matches.
matches.withdrawNotice: Match closed. You will see new matches at the next matching phase — check back tomorrow.

relationship_type.label: Relationship goals
relationship_type.description: How well your relationship goals (long-term, short-term, etc.) line up.

deal_breakers.label: Deal-breaker check
deal_breakers.description: Whether either person's deal-breakers show up in the other's lifestyle.

religion_compatibility.label: Religion
religion_compatibility.description: How compatible your religious backgrounds and openness are.

affection_importance.label: Affection style
affection_importance.description: How closely your views on physical affection match.

long_distance.label: Long distance
long_distance.description: Whether you're both open to a long-distance relationship.

lifestyle.label: Lifestyle
lifestyle.description: How similar your day-to-day lifestyles are.

numeric_compatibility.label: Core preferences
numeric_compatibility.description: How closely your relationship preferences line up structurally.

lifestyle_similarity.label: Lifestyle
lifestyle_similarity.description: How similar your lifestyles are based on what you wrote.

character_cross_match.label: Personality fit
character_cross_match.description: How well your personalities match what each of you is looking for.

character_a_wants_b.label: Their vibe vs. what you want
character_a_wants_b.description: How well their personality matches what you said you're looking for.

character_b_wants_a.label: Your vibe vs. what they want
character_b_wants_a.description: How well your personality matches what they said they're looking for.

deal_breaker_penalty.label: Deal-breaker check
deal_breaker_penalty.description: Whether either person's deal-breakers show up in the other's lifestyle.

settings.title: Settings
settings.newTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.deactivateNote: Once deactivated, your account will be scheduled for deletion in 180 days.
settings.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone. Your account will be scheduled for deletion in 180 days.
settings.alreadyDeactivated: Your account is already deactivated. You can cancel or speed up the scheduled deletion from your dashboard.
